description_long: This is a single-engine, propeller-driven airplane with a classic monoplane design, featuring a straight, high-mounted wing configuration. The fuselage is streamlined and tapers towards the tail, which has a conventional tail assembly with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers. The landing gear is fixed and consists of two main wheels and a tailwheel, characteristic of a taildragger configuration. The engine is mounted at the nose, with a visible propeller and radial engine details. The cockpit is positioned forward on the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating one or two seats. The exterior surface is smooth and metallic, with minimal visible markings or color variation.
description: A classic, high-wing, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage, fixed taildragger landing gear, and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high-mounted straight wing, streamlined fuselage, and taildragger landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the propeller, radial engine, and the full wingspan with fixed main gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wing, fuselage, and tail assembly with visible landing gear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the tail structure, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the main landing gear alignment.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing monoplane with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a front propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a tailwheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit likely configured for one or two seats with a clear canopy.
